mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM v_ideology_value WHERE id IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_ideology_value WHERE vname = #{vname} AND classroom_id = #{classroomId}
SELECT id,vname,remark,classroom_id AS classroomId,create_time AS createTime,update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value

SELECT id,vname,remark,classroom_id AS classroomId,create_time AS createTime,update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value
classroom_id = #{classroomId}
AND vname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{vname},'%')
AND remark LIKE CONCAT('%',#{remark},'%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_classroom WHERE id = #{classroomId}
